hero.title: The scholarship platform built around you.
hero.subtitle: Discover, track, and secure scholarships with AI-matched recommendations and verified consultants — all in one gated workspace.
hero.trustedBy: Trusted by students from leading universities worldwide
hero.builtAtName: Faculty of Graduate Studies for Statistical Research, Cairo University

discovery.title: Smart discovery
discovery.body: Search 100K+ opportunities and see AI match scores personalized to your profile.

tracking.title: In-app tracking
tracking.body: Apply directly or self-track external applications in a single unified kanban.

consultants.title: Verified consultants
consultants.body: Book one-to-one sessions with secure Stripe-held payments and transparent refunds.

community.title: Trusted community
community.body: Real-time 1:1 chat, a moderated forum, and curated resources from alumni and experts.

showcase.heading: A workspace that does the hard work for you.
showcase.subtitle: From discovery to acceptance, every step is connected and tracked in one place.

ai.title: AI-Powered Matching
ai.body: Our engine reads your profile and ranks scholarships by fit, deadline urgency, and acceptance probability.

consultants.title: Expert Consultants
consultants.body: Vetted advisors from top programs. Pay securely, message in real-time, refund anytime before the session.

verified.title: Verified Scholarships
verified.body: Every listing is manually reviewed. No scams, no broken links — only opportunities worth your time.

pricing.heading: Honest, transparent pricing.
pricing.subtitle: Students browse and apply for free. You only pay when you book a consultant — and consultants set their own rates.
pricing.smallPrint: Payments are held in Stripe escrow until the session concludes. Full refund up to 24 hours before — partial refund inside 24 hours.

free.name: For students
free.tagline: Discover, track, and apply — completely free.

features.tracking: Kanban tracking for in-app and external applications
features.documents: Secure document vault and AI writing tools

consultations.name: Consultant sessions
consultations.tagline: Book verified advisors when you need expert eyes.

features.consultants: Vetted consultants across countries and specialisations
features.escrow: Stripe-held funds — released only after the session
features.messaging: Real-time chat with your consultant before and after
features.feedback: Transparent reviews from every previous student

features.analytics: Analytics on reach, applicants, and acceptance

testimonials.heading: Stories from students just like you.
testimonials.subtitle: Real outcomes from the ScholarPath community.

first.quote: ScholarPath matched me with a fully funded master's program I had never heard of. The consultant prep made the application feel effortless.
first.name: Layla H.

second.quote: The kanban for tracking applications saved my sanity. I could finally see every deadline and document in one place.
second.name: Omar K.

third.quote: I booked three consultant sessions before my interview. The Stripe-held payment made me trust the process completely.
third.name: Maya R.

ready.title: Ready to start?
ready.body: Register in less than a minute. No credit card required.

footer.tagline: The bilingual scholarship workspace for ambitious students.
